title: RDS - Remote Desktop Service
body: The Remote Desktop Service (RDS) is a Windows Terminal Server that provides supplemental and/or remote access to applications that are only available on campus, typically on a Windows platform. See: UW-Madison Remote Desktop Service - Connection Instructions ECMS - Using RDS for Perceptive Content [Link for document 33032 is unavailable at this time] RDS Login: UW-Madison Remote Desktop Service
